domain_archetypes.name: runanywhere evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: runanywhere signal changes while fastest context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: fastest boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: fastest handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: device regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: device behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: apple operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: apple output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
